error_signature: Your request is invalid or could not be processed by the service
title: GitHub Node request invalid due to binary data handling
symptom: The GitHub node fails with 'Your request is invalid or could not be processed by the service' when trying to upload binary files.
root_cause: In n8n version 2.2.6, the GitHub node improperly handles binary data due to changes in how binary data is processed, leading to invalid requests when uploading files.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 2.3.0 or later
Test the GitHub node again to ensure it works correctly.
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 2.3.0 or later to resolve the GitHub node issue.
